title: Assorted's Realistic Modpack
description: Assorted's Realistic ModPack is a modpack that aims to make minecraft as realistic as possible.
body:
# Assorted's Realistic Modpack

## Assorted's Realistic Modpack Information
- **Assorted's Realistic ModPack** aims to make minecraft realistic as possible. Experience over 20+ plus mods, Assorteds realistic modpack will be updated regularly. This modpack was made with passion and love for minecraft.
- **Assorteds Realistic modpack** has a new version out now (**Beta 1.1**)

## Commom Questions

- **Why download it**? this mod aims to make minecraft more realistic then ever, it also helps support me.
- **Do you plan on adding new mods?** Yes, I have already made a beta version and plan on adding more and more mods in the future but for now I am slowly adding mods to the modpack.

## Important Information
- The mod has sodium and Lithium pre-installed I plan to add more client and sever side performance mods.
